name: Michael Brown
about: 5 years in men's suiting and tailored apparel at Brooks Brothers and Suitsupply. Deep knowledge of construction and fit. New to Reflex, looking to expand into flex work.
interviewTranscript: I have five years of experience in men's tailored apparel. I know construction—canvas vs fused, Super 120s vs 150s—and I can explain it to customers in a way that helps them understand the value. Fit is everything in suits and I've developed an eye for it. I'm joining Reflex because I want to pick up shifts while I figure out my next full-time move. I'm reliable and I bring deep product knowledge.
